Class EntityMetaData

java.lang.Object
iu.dao.EntityMetaData
class EntityMetaData extends Object
Holds all reflection- and annotation-derived metadata for a JPA entity class.

An instance is created once per entity class and cached by the SQL builder. Construction eagerly resolves table names, column mappings, feature flags, and secondary-table join conditions so that later SQL generation is allocation-free.

Table name resolution follows this priority order:

  1. Table.name() if @Table is present and non-blank
  2. Entity.name() if @Entity is present and non-blank
  3. Class.getSimpleName() as a final fallback

Only properties whose getter is annotated with Column or SqlColumn (and not Transient) are included in the column maps. Properties in the primary table are further partitioned into idColumns, primaryColumns, and primaryNonIdColumns.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) final Map<String, ColumnMetaData>
    columns
    All mapped columns keyed by ColumnMetaData.propertyName in bean-introspection order.
    (package private) final Map<String, ColumnMetaData>
    columnsByNormalizedColumn
    Column-mapped columns keyed by their normalized column name (ColumnMetaData.columnName uppercased and trimmed).
    (package private) final Map<String,String>
    columnToPropertyNames
    Maps each normalized column name to the property name of its ColumnMetaData.
    (package private) final boolean
    distinct
    true when the entity class (or a superclass) carries the Distinct annotation, causing SELECT DISTINCT to be emitted.
    (package private) final edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    effectiveDated
    The EffectiveDated annotation from the entity hierarchy, or null when absent.
    (package private) final Class<?>
    entityClass
    The entity class this metadata was built from.
    (package private) final edu.iu.dao.Filtered
    filtered
    The Filtered annotation from the entity hierarchy, or null when absent.
    (package private) final Iterable<ColumnMetaData>
    idColumns
    Columns whose getter carries Id, in bean-introspection order.
    (package private) final edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    joinType
    The join type used when joining secondary tables.
    (package private) final Iterable<ColumnMetaData>
    primaryColumns
    All Column-mapped columns belonging to the primary table, in bean-introspection order.
    (package private) final Iterable<ColumnMetaData>
    primaryNonIdColumns
    Primary-table columns that are not annotated with Id.
    (package private) final TableMetaData
    primaryTable
    Metadata for the primary table; always assigned the alias "a".
    (package private) final Iterable<TableMetaData>
    secondaryTables
    Ordered list of secondary-table metadata; empty when no SecondaryTable or SecondaryTables annotation is present.
    (package private) final Map<Long,String>
    selectAndFromCache
    Cache for SELECT … FROM clause fragments, keyed by fingerprint.
    (package private) final Map<Long,String>
    selectStatementCache
    Cache for complete SELECT statement strings, keyed by fingerprint.
    (package private) final boolean
    spaceForNull
    true when the entity class (or a superclass) carries the SpaceForNull annotation at the class level, causing null bound values to be replaced with a single space for all columns unless overridden at the property level.
    (package private) final Map<String, TableMetaData>
    tablesByReference
    Lookup map for all tables (primary and secondary) keyed by each of the table's short name, fully-qualified name, and alias — all normalized via DaoUtils.normalizeName(String).
    (package private) final Map<Long,String>
    updateStatementCache
    Cache for UPDATE statement strings, keyed by fingerprint.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EntityMetaData(Class<?> entityClass)
    Constructs metadata for the given entity class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) String
    buildEffectiveDateCriteria(String outerAlias, String effectiveColumn, String asOfDate, boolean future, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
    Builds a correlated subquery predicate that constrains a date column to its maximum (past) or minimum (future) effective value as of the given date.
    (package private) String
    buildEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(String outerAlias, String effectiveColumn, String sequenceColumn, String asOfDate, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
    Builds a pair of correlated subquery predicates that together select the row with the maximum effective date as of the given date AND the maximum sequence number for that effective date.
    (package private) String
    buildMaxDateCriteria(String outerAlias, String maxDateColumn, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
    Builds a correlated subquery predicate that constrains a date column to the maximum value across all rows with the same ID columns.
    (package private) String
    columnReference(String table, String columnOrProperty)
    Returns a alias.column SQL reference for a property or column name.
    (package private) Iterable<String>
    defaultPropertyNames()
    Returns all mapped property names in the order they were discovered during bean introspection (superclass properties first, then subclass properties; within each class in the order returned by Introspector).
    (package private) Iterable<String>
    effectiveDateKeyColumns(String effectiveColumn, String[] additional, String[] unmapped)
    Returns the column names used to correlate effective-date subqueries for the given date column.
    (package private) String
    getColumnCompareCriteria(String col, String comp, Iterable<String> matchList)
    Returns a SQL comparison predicate for a primary-table column against a list of values.
    (package private) String
    getColumnMatchCriteria(String col, Iterable<String> matchList)
    Returns a alias.column IN (v1, v2, ...) SQL predicate for the given column and match values.
    (package private) String
    getDeleteStatement()
    Returns the DELETE FROM … WHERE id = ? statement for the primary table.
    (package private) String
    getInsertStatement()
    Returns the INSERT INTO … (cols) VALUES (?, …) statement for the primary table.
    (package private) String
    getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(String tab, String col, String comp, Iterable<String> matchList)
    Returns a SQL comparison predicate for a column in the given table against a list of values.
    (package private) String
    getSelectAndFromClause(Iterable<String> props)
    Returns a SELECT … FROM … SQL clause with JOIN expressions for each secondary table, optionally restricted to a subset of columns.
    (package private) String
    getSelectStatement(Iterable<String> props, Iterable<String> where, Iterable<String> order, boolean forUpdate)
    Returns a complete SELECT statement including WHERE, ORDER BY, and optionally FOR UPDATE clauses.
    (package private) String
    getUpdateStatement(Iterable<String> properties)
    Returns an UPDATE … SET … WHERE statement for the given primary-table properties.
    (package private) static EntityMetaData
    of(Class<?> entityClass)
    Returns the cached EntityMetaData for the given entity class, constructing it on the first call.
    (package private) ColumnMetaData
    requirePrimaryColumn(String property)
    Looks up a primary-table column by property or column name, throwing if it is not found or does not belong to the primary table.
    (package private) String
    resolveAlias(String tableOrAlias)
    Resolves a table name or alias to the canonical alias used in SQL.
    (package private) ColumnMetaData
    resolveColumn(String propertyOrColumn)
    Looks up a column by property name or by normalized column name.

    resolveEffectiveDatedCriteria()
    Resolves effective-date subquery predicates from the EffectiveDated annotation.
    (package private) String
    resolveFilter(edu.iu.dao.SqlFilter filter)
    Converts a single SqlFilter annotation into a SQL predicate string.
    (package private) Iterable<String>
    resolveFilters()
    Resolves the Filtered annotation's filter entries into SQL predicate strings.

    Resolves a table reference to its TableMetaData.

  • Field Details

    • entityClass

      final Class<?> entityClass
      The entity class this metadata was built from.

    • primaryTable

      final TableMetaData primaryTable
      Metadata for the primary table; always assigned the alias "a".

    • secondaryTables

      final Iterable<TableMetaData> secondaryTables
      Ordered list of secondary-table metadata; empty when no SecondaryTable or SecondaryTables annotation is present. Secondary tables receive aliases "b", "c", etc. in the order they are declared.

    • tablesByReference

      final Map<String, TableMetaData> tablesByReference
      Lookup map for all tables (primary and secondary) keyed by each of the table's short name, fully-qualified name, and alias — all normalized via DaoUtils.normalizeName(String).

    • columns

      final Map<String, ColumnMetaData> columns
      All mapped columns keyed by ColumnMetaData.propertyName in bean-introspection order. Includes both primary-table and secondary-table columns, as well as raw-SQL SqlColumn properties.

    • columnsByNormalizedColumn

      final Map<String, ColumnMetaData> columnsByNormalizedColumn
      Column-mapped columns keyed by their normalized column name (ColumnMetaData.columnName uppercased and trimmed). Excludes SqlColumn properties, which have no physical column name.

    • columnToPropertyNames

      final Map<String,String> columnToPropertyNames
      Maps each normalized column name to the property name of its ColumnMetaData. Mirrors columnsByNormalizedColumn but stores the property name rather than the full metadata object.

    • idColumns

      final Iterable<ColumnMetaData> idColumns
      Columns whose getter carries Id, in bean-introspection order.

    • primaryColumns

      final Iterable<ColumnMetaData> primaryColumns
      All Column-mapped columns belonging to the primary table, in bean-introspection order. Includes both @Id and non-@Id columns.

    • primaryNonIdColumns

      final Iterable<ColumnMetaData> primaryNonIdColumns
      Primary-table columns that are not annotated with Id. Used to build SET clauses in UPDATE statements.

    • joinType

      final edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type joinType
      The join type used when joining secondary tables. Defaults to SqlJoinType.Type.INNER when SqlJoinType is absent.

    • distinct

      final boolean distinct
      true when the entity class (or a superclass) carries the Distinct annotation, causing SELECT DISTINCT to be emitted.

    • spaceForNull

      final boolean spaceForNull
      true when the entity class (or a superclass) carries the SpaceForNull annotation at the class level, causing null bound values to be replaced with a single space for all columns unless overridden at the property level.

    • filtered

      final edu.iu.dao.Filtered filtered
      The Filtered annotation from the entity hierarchy, or null when absent. When present, its Filtered.filters() are resolved into additional WHERE predicates.

    • effectiveDated

      final edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated effectiveDated
      The EffectiveDated annotation from the entity hierarchy, or null when absent. When present, effective-date subquery criteria can be generated.

    • selectAndFromCache

      final Map<Long,String> selectAndFromCache
      Cache for SELECT … FROM clause fragments, keyed by fingerprint.

    • selectStatementCache

      final Map<Long,String> selectStatementCache
      Cache for complete SELECT statement strings, keyed by fingerprint.

    • updateStatementCache

      final Map<Long,String> updateStatementCache
      Cache for UPDATE statement strings, keyed by fingerprint.

  • Constructor Details

    • EntityMetaData

      EntityMetaData(Class<?> entityClass)
      Constructs metadata for the given entity class.

      The constructor performs the following steps:

      1. Resolves the primary table name and schema from Table, Entity, or the simple class name.
      2. Resolves optional feature annotations: SqlJoinType, Distinct, SpaceForNull, Filtered, EffectiveDated.
      3. Builds secondaryTables from SecondaryTable and/or SecondaryTables annotations, assigning sequential aliases starting at "b".
      4. Scans all bean properties for Column and SqlColumn annotations, skipping Transient properties and those with neither annotation.
      5. Initializes join conditions on each secondary table.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class to introspect; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • of

      static EntityMetaData of(Class<?> entityClass)
      Returns the cached EntityMetaData for the given entity class, constructing it on the first call.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class to look up; must not be null
      Returns:
      singleton metadata instance for that class
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if entityClass is null

    • resolveTable

      TableMetaData resolveTable(String tableName)
      Resolves a table reference to its TableMetaData.

      If tableName is blank or null, the primary table is returned. Otherwise the name is normalized and looked up in tablesByReference.

      Parameters:
      tableName - table short name, fully-qualified name, or alias; may be null or blank
      Returns:
      matching TableMetaData
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if tableName is non-blank but does not match any registered table

    • resolveAlias

      String resolveAlias(String tableOrAlias)
      Resolves a table name or alias to the canonical alias used in SQL.

      Returns the primary table alias ("a") when tableOrAlias is blank or null. Otherwise looks up the value in tablesByReference and returns the matched table's alias. If no match is found the input is returned unchanged, allowing callers to pass through literal alias strings.

      Parameters:
      tableOrAlias - table name, fully-qualified name, or existing alias; may be null or blank
      Returns:
      resolved alias, or tableOrAlias unchanged when not found

    • resolveColumn

      ColumnMetaData resolveColumn(String propertyOrColumn)
      Looks up a column by property name or by normalized column name.

      The lookup order is:

      1. Exact match against ColumnMetaData.propertyName in columns.
      2. Normalized match (DaoUtils.normalizeName(String)) against columnsByNormalizedColumn.
      Parameters:
      propertyOrColumn - property name or physical column name (case insensitive for the latter)
      Returns:
      matching ColumnMetaData, or null when not found

    • defaultPropertyNames

      Iterable<String> defaultPropertyNames()
      Returns all mapped property names in the order they were discovered during bean introspection (superclass properties first, then subclass properties; within each class in the order returned by Introspector).
      Returns:
      property name iterable; never null

    • buildEffectiveDateCriteria

      String buildEffectiveDateCriteria(String outerAlias, String effectiveColumn, String asOfDate, boolean future, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds a correlated subquery predicate that constrains a date column to its maximum (past) or minimum (future) effective value as of the given date.

      The generated SQL has the form: 

      outerAlias.effectiveColumn = (SELECT MAX/MIN(sub_ed.effectiveColumn)
        FROM primaryTable sub_ed
       WHERE sub_ed.id = outerAlias.id
         AND sub_ed.effectiveColumn <= / > asOfDate)
      Parameters:
      outerAlias - alias of the outer query table
      effectiveColumn - column that holds the effective date
      asOfDate - SQL expression for the as-of date (e.g. "CURRENT_DATE")
      future - true to select the minimum future date; false for the maximum past date
      idColumnNames - column names used to correlate the subquery
      Returns:
      SQL predicate string

    • buildMaxDateCriteria

      String buildMaxDateCriteria(String outerAlias, String maxDateColumn, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds a correlated subquery predicate that constrains a date column to the maximum value across all rows with the same ID columns.

      The generated SQL has the form: 

      outerAlias.maxDateColumn = (SELECT MAX(sub_md.maxDateColumn)
        FROM primaryTable sub_md
       WHERE sub_md.id = outerAlias.id)
      Parameters:
      outerAlias - alias of the outer query table
      maxDateColumn - column that holds the maximum date
      idColumnNames - column names used to correlate the subquery
      Returns:
      SQL predicate string

    • buildEffectiveDateSeqCriteria

      String buildEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(String outerAlias, String effectiveColumn, String sequenceColumn, String asOfDate, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds a pair of correlated subquery predicates that together select the row with the maximum effective date as of the given date AND the maximum sequence number for that effective date.

      Combines an effective-date subquery (via buildEffectiveDateCriteria(String, String, String, boolean, Iterable)) with a sequence subquery that further narrows the result to the single row with the highest sequence number on the chosen effective date.

      Parameters:
      outerAlias - alias of the outer query table
      effectiveColumn - column holding the effective date
      sequenceColumn - column holding the sequence number
      asOfDate - SQL expression for the as-of date
      idColumnNames - column names used to correlate the subquery
      Returns:
      SQL predicate string containing two correlated subquery conditions

    • requirePrimaryColumn

      ColumnMetaData requirePrimaryColumn(String property)
      Looks up a primary-table column by property or column name, throwing if it is not found or does not belong to the primary table.
      Parameters:
      property - property name or physical column name to look up
      Returns:
      matching primary-table ColumnMetaData
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the property is unknown or maps to a secondary table

    • columnReference

      String columnReference(String table, String columnOrProperty)
      Returns a alias.column SQL reference for a property or column name.

      If columnOrProperty resolves to a known ColumnMetaData, the column's own reference is returned (with the given table alias override if non-null). Otherwise resolveAlias(String) is applied to table and the raw columnOrProperty string is appended.

      Parameters:
      table - table name, alias, or null for the primary table
      columnOrProperty - property name or physical column name
      Returns:
      SQL column reference string (e.g. "a.MY_COLUMN")

    • getColumnMatchCriteria

      String getColumnMatchCriteria(String col, Iterable<String> matchList)
      Returns a alias.column IN (v1, v2, ...) SQL predicate for the given column and match values.
      Parameters:
      col - property name or physical column name
      matchList - values to include in the IN list
      Returns:
      SQL IN predicate string

    • getColumnCompareCriteria

      String getColumnCompareCriteria(String col, String comp, Iterable<String> matchList)
      Returns a SQL comparison predicate for a primary-table column against a list of values. Delegates to getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(String, String, String, Iterable) with tab=null.
      Parameters:
      col - property name or physical column name
      comp - SQL comparison operator (e.g. "=", "LIKE")
      matchList - right-hand-side values
      Returns:
      SQL predicate string, or null when matchList is empty

    • getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria

      String getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(String tab, String col, String comp, Iterable<String> matchList)
      Returns a SQL comparison predicate for a column in the given table against a list of values.
      • Returns null when matchList is empty.
      • Returns "alias.COL comp value" when exactly one value is present.
      • Returns "(alias.COL comp v1 OR alias.COL comp v2 OR ...)" when multiple values are present.
      Parameters:
      tab - table name, alias, or null for the primary table
      col - property name or physical column name
      comp - SQL comparison operator
      matchList - right-hand-side values
      Returns:
      SQL predicate string, or null when matchList is empty

    • getSelectAndFromClause

      String getSelectAndFromClause(Iterable<String> props)
      Returns a SELECT … FROM … SQL clause with JOIN expressions for each secondary table, optionally restricted to a subset of columns.

      Results are cached by fingerprint of the effective property list. The synchronized keyword protects the shared selectAndFromCache.

      Parameters:
      props - property names to include in the SELECT list; pass null to include defaultPropertyNames()
      Returns:
      SQL string starting with "SELECT" and ending after the last JOIN … ON clause
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if props resolves to an empty sequence

    • getSelectStatement

      String getSelectStatement(Iterable<String> props, Iterable<String> where, Iterable<String> order, boolean forUpdate)
      Returns a complete SELECT statement including WHERE, ORDER BY, and optionally FOR UPDATE clauses.

      The effective WHERE criteria are the union of where, resolveFilters(), and resolveEffectiveDatedCriteria(). Results are cached by fingerprint of all inputs.

      Parameters:
      props - property names for the SELECT list; null uses defaultPropertyNames()
      where - additional WHERE predicates; may be empty
      order - ORDER BY expressions; may be empty
      forUpdate - true to append FOR UPDATE
      Returns:
      complete SQL SELECT statement

    • getUpdateStatement

      String getUpdateStatement(Iterable<String> properties)
      Returns an UPDATE … SET … WHERE statement for the given primary-table properties.

      Results are cached by fingerprint of properties. Throws IuSqlUnchangedException when properties is empty.

      Parameters:
      properties - property names to include in the SET clause; must not be empty
      Returns:
      SQL UPDATE statement
      Throws:
      edu.iu.dao.IuSqlUnchangedException - if properties is empty
      IllegalArgumentException - if any property is unknown or maps to a secondary table

    • getInsertStatement

      String getInsertStatement()
      Returns the INSERT INTO … (cols) VALUES (?, …) statement for the primary table.

      Lazily built on the first call and then cached for the lifetime of this metadata instance.

      Returns:
      SQL INSERT statement

    • getDeleteStatement

      String getDeleteStatement()
      Returns the DELETE FROM … WHERE id = ? statement for the primary table.

      Lazily built on the first call and then cached. Throws UnsupportedOperationException when the entity carries EffectiveDated.

      Returns:
      SQL DELETE statement
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if the entity is effective-dated

    • resolveFilters

      Iterable<String> resolveFilters()
      Resolves the Filtered annotation's filter entries into SQL predicate strings.

      Returns IuIterable.empty() when no Filtered annotation is present. null values returned by resolveFilter(SqlFilter) are filtered out.

      Returns:
      lazy iterable of resolved SQL predicates

    • resolveFilter

      String resolveFilter(edu.iu.dao.SqlFilter filter)
      Converts a single SqlFilter annotation into a SQL predicate string.

      If SqlFilter.sql() is non-blank it is returned directly. Otherwise the filter is dispatched by SqlFilter.name():

      • "effectiveDate" — effective-date past subquery
      • "maxDate" — max-date subquery
      • "columnMatch" — IN predicate
      • "columnCompare" — comparison predicate
      Parameters:
      filter - filter to resolve; must not be null
      Returns:
      SQL predicate string
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the filter name is not supported

    • resolveEffectiveDatedCriteria

      Iterable<String> resolveEffectiveDatedCriteria()
      Resolves effective-date subquery predicates from the EffectiveDated annotation.

      Returns IuIterable.empty() when no EffectiveDated annotation is present or when EffectiveDated.currentOnly() is false. Otherwise produces one predicate per EffectiveDated.effectiveDatedColumns() entry.

      Returns:
      lazy iterable of SQL effective-date predicates

    • effectiveDateKeyColumns

      Iterable<String> effectiveDateKeyColumns(String effectiveColumn, String[] additional, String[] unmapped)
      Returns the column names used to correlate effective-date subqueries for the given date column.

      The result contains, in order:

      1. All idColumns whose normalized column name differs from effectiveColumn.
      2. Additional column names from additional.
      3. Unmapped column names from unmapped.
      Parameters:
      effectiveColumn - effective-date column name to exclude from the key set
      additional - additional mapped column names to include
      unmapped - raw column names with no entity mapping to include
      Returns:
      ordered set of column names (duplicates preserved per set semantics)

  • Copyright © 2026 Indiana University
